# `!wait_for_others`

**Category:** control

Barrier synchronization point for --async mode; all hosts must reach this task before any proceed past it. Silently skipped in non-async mode.

## Parameters

| Name | Type | Required | Description |
|---|---|---|---|
| `mode` | string | no | Barrier mode: strict or loose. Default loose. |

## Examples

```yaml
- !wait_for_others
  name: all nodes have rqlite installed
  mode: strict
```
